case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 90-210s checkoutservice metrics. Latency.p50 dev=+2.0 and trace latency spikes confirm checkoutservice as root cause. CPU/mem normal. Propagation evidence supports internal latency anomaly.

traces: [traces] id=T0465 window=120-150 edge=checkoutservice>checkoutservice op=GetQuote signal=latency.p99 dev=+2.7
[traces] id=T0469 window=120-150 edge=frontend>checkoutservice op=PlaceOrder signal=latency.self_p99 dev=+2.4

reasoner.analysis: Checkoutservice latency.p50 deviation confirms root cause. Adservice and recommendationservice latency anomalies are secondary.
